settings.title: One Shoulder Bikinis That Balance Style, Support & Sophistication
settings.text:
Our one shoulder bikinis are designed to turn heads while keeping you completely supported — from ocean dips to sunset lounging. This timeless silhouette offers a modern twist on the classic bikini, giving you that sculpted, confident look that flatters every curve.

Crafted from luxurious Italian recycled fabric, each one shoulder bikini in this collection offers buttery softness, UPF 50+ sun protection, and durability that lasts season after season. Whether you fall for the striking one shoulder bikini black or the feminine energy of our one shoulder bikini pink, each piece is made to move beautifully with your body — staying secure through surf, swim, and sun.

The asymmetric neckline and single-strap design create an elegant, athletic profile while offering surprising support. It’s the perfect blend of minimalism and strength — sleek, sustainable, and undeniably chic.

settings.subheading_text:
All Ocean Soul Swimwear is ethically handmade in Bali in small batches to reduce waste and empower local artisans. Our eco-friendly bikinis are crafted using regenerated nylon fibres derived from discarded fishing nets and post-industrial waste, giving ocean plastics a new life in swimwear designed to last.

Pair your one shoulder bikini top with our high-waisted or low-rise bikini bottoms, or style it under a resort sarong for an easy beach-to-brunch look. Every piece is consciously designed to make you feel supported, sculpted, and completely yourself — in and out of the water.

settings.title: Favourite bikini top!
settings.text: Supportive, feel-good, and a beautiful piece. I’ve been wearing this both as a top with shorts, and as a bikini at beach & at a spa! Makes me feel beautiful wearing! Love both the top and bottom! 💗
settings.author: Natalie

settings.title: Helpful support team
settings.text: Add a few sentences of text from a customer testimonial to your store.
settings.author: A. Customer

settings.title: Why Choose a One Shoulder Bikini?
settings.text:
A one shoulder bikini offers the best of both worlds — bold design and functional support. It’s sleek, feminine, and unique, making it a favourite among women who value modern style and all-day comfort.

Sculpting Fit: The asymmetric neckline defines the shoulders and elongates the torso for a refined, flattering look.

Secure Hold: Double-lined recycled fabric ensures support whether you’re swimming, surfing, or simply sunbathing.

Comfort Without Compromise: Seamless edges and premium stretch fabric move with your body, never against it.

settings.title: From Surf to Sunset
settings.text:
Our one shoulder bikinis are designed to move seamlessly with you — from active mornings to relaxed afternoons.

In the Water: Supportive enough for light surfing, ocean swims, or paddle boarding.

By the Pool: Sleek, sculpting, and ideal for tanning with minimal lines.

Beyond the Beach: Style your bikini with a resort sarong, wide-leg lounge pants, or a boyfriend tee for a laid-back, coastal look.

Whether you prefer the classic black one shoulder bikini for timeless sophistication or the soft blush-pink version for a feminine glow, both embody Ocean Soul’s signature combination of elegance, durability, and ethical design.

settings.title: Sustainable Swimwear, Ethically Made
settings.text:
At Ocean Soul Swimwear, sustainability is woven into everything we create. Our one shoulder bikini tops and bottoms are made from Econyl® recycled yarns, regenerating waste into premium fabric that’s soft, sculpting, and resistant to chlorine and salt.

Every suit is:

Ethically Handmade in Bali – crafted by local artisans earning fair wages.

Durable & Fade-Resistant – maintaining shape, colour, and support over time.

Eco-Conscious – produced in limited runs to minimise environmental impact.

By choosing a sustainable one shoulder bikini, you’re joining a movement toward conscious luxury — pieces that look incredible, perform beautifully, and protect what matters most: the planet.

settings.title: Design Details That Make the Difference
settings.text:
Our one-shoulder collection is built on thoughtful details:

Asymmetric Support – reinforced single strap ensures comfort and balance.

Seamless Finish – no digging or irritation, just a second-skin feel.

Double-Lined for Confidence – soft compression offers support without padding.

Sculpted Side Panels – smooth and flatter natural curves.

Each bikini is tested for fit and durability, ensuring it moves with you from surf to shore.

settings.heading: How to Style Your One Shoulder Bikini
settings.subheading_text:
For Minimalist Chic: Pair the black one shoulder bikini with gold accessories and a bamboo clutch for a timeless, refined look.

For Feminine Flair: Style the pink one shoulder bikini with a resort sarong or lightweight linen pants for an effortlessly soft beach aesthetic.

For Active Days: Layer under a long sleeve rashguard or wear with surf shorts for comfort and coverage.

Every combination is designed to make you feel confident, elevated, and ready for wherever the day takes you.

settings.title: Shop the Collection
settings.text:
Discover modern, sustainable swimwear that celebrates the female form. Whether you choose the sleek black one shoulder bikini for everyday elegance or the playful pink version for your next tropical escape, you’ll experience:

Sculpting support and seamless comfort

Eco-friendly Italian recycled fabric

Ethical craftsmanship made to last

Timeless design that transitions from ocean to everyday

Ocean Soul Swimwear — modern, conscious, and made for movement.
